summary: Phase D Prompt 2.2 Appraisals Core frontend — full e2e UI verification PASSED. Logged in as test-admin (MFA auto-enrol via pyotp) and drove Playwright browser end-to-end through AppraisalsList → AppraisalPage 5 tabs. All 18 review-request scenarios verified live against https://sy-spot-check-r70.preview.emergentagent.com.
critical_code_review_comments: AppraisalPage.jsx is 1176 lines — exceeds the 700-line threshold. Recommend splitting HeaderTab/UnitsTab/CostsTab/FinanceTab/SummaryTab/RlvForm into separate files for maintainability.
Costs tab category total uses raw r.amount even for stale auto rows — this is acceptable per spec (stale-until-save) but worth a short comment in code so future devs don't 'fix' it.

FacilityTab does not show LIVE interest/fees previews — every facility numeric column is stale-until-save, which is correct per spec but means user has no instant feedback while typing principal/rate. Consider future enhancement (out of Prompt 2.2 scope).

verified_scenarios.costs_seeded_auto_lines: PASS (8 auto-badges and 8 stale-amount-display cells rendered for SDLT_Engine + Finance_Engine seeded lines)
verified_scenarios.finance_facility_save: PASS (facility-save-0 persisted; facility-interest-0='£120,000.00' = 1,000,000 × 8% × 18m simple-monthly rough check, with stale pill)
verified_scenarios.rlv_three_state: PASS (initial=rlv-panel-empty TRUE; after rlv-run-btn → rlv-panel-calculated TRUE, empty/non_convergence FALSE — panel FLIPPED state, did not collapse)
verified_scenarios.approve_state_machine: PASS (approve-appraisal-btn visible in Submitted; click → state badge='Approved'; reopen-appraisal-btn visible)
verified_scenarios.reject_state_machine: PASS (window.prompt accepted reason 'Insufficient detail in cost lines'; state='Rejected'; rejection-reason-banner visible)

test_credentials: test-admin@example.test / TestUser-Dev-2026! — used login_with_auto_enroll pattern (re-ran scripts/seed_test_users.py before each browser session to clear MFA state, then enrolled via pyotp and injected the resulting access_token cookie into Playwright).
seed_data_creation: Created one project 'TEST_Appraisal_E2E' (Pure_Dev, primary_entity_id=existing entity, land_ownership_method=Direct_Purchase, site_postcode/start_date stubbed) because the SY Homes tenant had 0 projects. Created 2 appraisal versions (v1=Approved, v2=Rejected) plus a unit row, a manual cost line, and a finance facility — all prefixed with TEST_ for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prompt 2.2 frontend is fully verified live. All data-testid hooks the spec requires are wired correctly. AppraisalPage.jsx is 1176 lines — flag for future refactor (>700-line guideline). Note: the auto-cost-lines count was 8 (not just 2); this is because backend seeds multiple Percentage_Of_GDV/Build/Land lines plus SDLT_Engine + Finance_Engine — all are stale-until-save per spec, which is correct. RLV converged on first run with basis=on_cost, target_pct=20 against the seeded unit (£1.5m GDV / £750k build / £250k land). For project creation, /api/projects requires: name, primary_entity_id, project_type, tenure_mix, land_status, land_ownership_method, site_address, site_postcode, post_code, project_code, start_date, target_completion_date, status, currency — schema has tightened since iteration_7.
